title: Skill Junction Unification - Superseded

progress.note: Original plan was not executed as written; current architecture was resolved by later tracks and documentation.

summary: This May 2026 planning track proposed making both ~/.codex/skills and ~/.agents/skills parent junctions to ~/.opencode-lazy-vault. The Codex parent-junction architecture is now valid and documented, but .agents/skills is no longer treated as an active required surface. The current authoritative policy is in docs/runbooks/codex-skill-architecture.md.
closure_notes: Do not execute this plan as written. Its counts, always-on set, plugin-config assumptions, and .agents guidance are stale.
Codex access is now provided by C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.codex\skills -> C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.opencode-lazy-vault.
C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.agents\skills is legacy/non-authoritative unless a future tool explicitly requires it.
New skills default to C:\Users\DaveWitkin\.opencode-lazy-vault as real folders; OneDrive-backed junctions are optional historical sync plumbing, not the default.

validation.evidence: Current filesystem audit and later Codex architecture runbook supersede this plan.
